info.title: E-Mall API
info.description: Production-grade OpenAPI documentation for the E-Mall Node.js, Express, TypeScript, and MongoDB backend.

tags.name: Auth
tags.description: Authentication, token issuance, password reset, and email verification flows.

tags.name: Categories
tags.description: Catalog categories and category usage lifecycle operations.

tags.name: Stores
tags.description: Public store discovery and admin-facing store lifecycle operations.

tags.name: Store Management
tags.description: Owner/admin store settings, dashboards, orders, and store-scoped product tools.

tags.name: Store Products
tags.description: Store-scoped product creation and management endpoints.

tags.name: Catalog
tags.description: Public product browsing and product lookup by slug.

tags.name: Cart
tags.description: Authenticated cart management for the current user.

tags.name: Wishlist
tags.description: Authenticated wishlist management for the current user.

tags.name: Addresses
tags.description: Authenticated address book management for the current user.

tags.name: Orders
tags.description: Customer order lifecycle operations and payment initiation.

tags.name: Delivery
tags.description: Fulfillment and admin delivery workflow operations.

tags.name: Notifications
tags.description: Authenticated in-app notification access and mutation.

post.description: Public signup endpoint. Issues an access token and a refresh token cookie.
Public login endpoint. Issues an access token and a refresh token cookie.
Uses the refreshToken cookie to issue a new access token and refresh token cookie.

get.description: Clears the refresh token cookie and revokes the server-side refresh session.

post.description: Sends a reset email to the account owner.
Uses the reset token from the URL path together with the new password payload.
Public endpoint that sends an email verification code to the supplied email address.

patch.description: Public endpoint that validates the verification code for the supplied email address.

get.description: Public endpoint that returns all categories ordered alphabetically.

post.description: ADMIN only. Creates a category and optionally links it to a parent category.

get.description: Returns product and store usage for the category.
Public endpoint that returns a single category record.

patch.description: ADMIN only. Updates the category name or parent category.

delete.description: ADMIN only. Rejects deletion when the category is still in use.

post.description: ADMIN only. Repoints downstream usage to another category and returns migration metadata.

get.description: Public store listing. Admin users can use the active filter to include inactive stores.

post.description: ADMIN only. Creates a store and requires either categoryId or categoryName.

get.description: Public category-scoped store listing. Admin users can use the active filter to include inactive stores.
ADMIN only. Returns stores with owner details and supports the active filter.
Public store details by store identifier.

get.summary: List public products for a store
get.description: Public store product listing with search, paging, and activity filters.
Public product detail lookup within a specific store.
OWNER or ADMIN only. Returns the store owned by the authenticated user.

patch.description: OWNER or ADMIN only. Updates store settings for a store owned by the authenticated user.

get.description: OWNER or ADMIN only. Returns sales and product engagement statistics for the store.

delete.description: ADMIN only. Permanently deletes a store.

get.description: OWNER or ADMIN only. Returns all products for the requested store with paging and search.

post.description: OWNER or ADMIN only. Creates a product for the specified store.

get.description: OWNER or ADMIN only. Returns a single store-owned product.

patch.description: OWNER or ADMIN only. Updates an existing store product.

delete.description: OWNER or ADMIN only. Deletes a product from the store.

get.description: OWNER or ADMIN only. Returns orders for the store in a store-scoped view.
OWNER or ADMIN only. Returns a single store-scoped order view.

patch.description: OWNER or ADMIN only. Updates store order state, status, and missing-item metadata.

get.description: Public product browsing endpoint with paging, filtering, sorting, and attribute filtering.
Public product lookup by slug. Optionally accepts storeId to disambiguate between stores.
Authenticated cart retrieval for the current user.

delete.description: Authenticated cart mutation for the current user.

post.description: Authenticated cart mutation for the current user.

patch.description: Authenticated cart mutation for the current user.

delete.description: Authenticated cart mutation for the current user.

get.description: Authenticated wishlist retrieval for the current user.

delete.description: Authenticated wishlist mutation for the current user.

post.description: Authenticated wishlist mutation for the current user.

delete.description: Authenticated wishlist mutation for the current user.

get.description: Authenticated address book retrieval.

post.description: Authenticated creation of a new address.

get.description: Authenticated retrieval of the current default address.
Authenticated retrieval of a specific address owned by the current user.

patch.description: Authenticated update of a specific address owned by the current user.

delete.description: Authenticated deletion of a specific address owned by the current user.

patch.description: Authenticated default-address mutation for a specific address.

get.description: Authenticated user order history.

post.description: Authenticated order creation using a saved address and payment method.

get.description: Authenticated order lookup for the current user.

patch.description: Authenticated order mutation for the current user.
Authenticated order mutation for the current user.

post.description: Authenticated online-payment flow for the current user's order.

get.description: FULFILLMENT or ADMIN only. Returns orders available to the delivery workflow.

patch.summary: Assign a rider to an order
patch.description: FULFILLMENT or ADMIN only. Assigns a rider to a delivery order.
FULFILLMENT or ADMIN only. Marks the order as being collected.
FULFILLMENT or ADMIN only. Marks the order as on the way.
FULFILLMENT or ADMIN only. Marks the order as delivered.

post.description: Webhook endpoint used by the payment provider to update order payment state.

get.description: Authenticated paginated notification listing.
Authenticated unread notification listing.
Authenticated unread notification count endpoint.

patch.description: Authenticated notification mutation for the current user.
Authenticated notification mutation for the current user.

delete.description: Authenticated notification mutation for the current user.

BearerAuth.description: JWT access token passed in the Authorization header as Bearer <token>.

RefreshTokenCookie.name: refreshToken
RefreshTokenCookie.description: HttpOnly refresh token cookie issued on login/register/refresh and required for refresh/logout.

LimitParam.name: limit
LimitParam.description: Maximum number of items per page.

StoreQueryParam.name: storeId
StoreQueryParam.description: Filter products by a store identifier.

ShopIdParam.name: shopId
ShopIdParam.description: Alternate store identifier accepted by the product search pipeline.

ColorParam.name: color
ColorParam.description: Variant color filter. Additional top-level query keys are also treated as attribute filters.

message.example: Your order is ready for delivery.
Category replacement processed. Please note: Products and Stores using the old category need to be migrated manually or via a migration script.

AuthEmailVerificationRequest.description: Verify the email address with the code.

CategoryReplaceRequest.description: Replace a category with another category.

StoreProductCreateRequest.description: Create a product inside a store.

CartAddItemRequest.description: Add an item to the cart.

WishlistAddItemRequest.description: Add an item to the wishlist.

AddressSetDefaultRequest.description: Set or unset the default address flag.

StoreOrderUpdateRequest.description: Update store order status and rejection metadata.

DeliveryAssignRequest.description: Assign a rider to an order.

AuthSessionResponse.description: Authentication succeeded and an access token was issued.

UnauthorizedResponse.description: Authentication is required or the token is invalid.

ForbiddenResponse.description: The authenticated user lacks permission for this route.
